title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 374.010 - Department — general powers
text:
374.010.  Department — general powers. — The department of commerce and insurance shall be charged with the execution of all laws now in force, or which may be hereafter enacted, in relation to insurance and insurance companies doing business in this state, and such other duties as are provided for by law.
(RSMo 1939 § 5780, A.L. 1990 H.B. 1739) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 5670; 1919 § 6082; 1909 § 6877
